stage_description: All records retrieved across database/source runs before cross-source deduplication and eligibility screening.
Records remaining after duplicate removal and exclusion of records under four pages/short papers where insufficient details were available for consistent coding.
notes: Boundary decision requested by reviewers; retained for audit trail.

stage_description: Records retained after title and abstract screening against inclusion/exclusion criteria.
notes: Screening stage used to remove clearly out-of-scope items.

stage_description: Records retained after inspection of introduction and conclusion for fairness/AI/requirements relevance.
Records assessed at full-text level and retained for quality assessment/coding eligibility checks.
notes: Full-text assessment stage before final corpus.

stage_description: Final peer-reviewed primary studies included in the analytical corpus.
notes: Final corpus used in manuscript analyses and RQ-level tables/figures.
